title: Highway Executive Given 12-Year Sentence Over Deadly Bridge Collapse in Italy
summary_full: Giovanni Castellucci oversaw a company that managed the Morandi Bridge in Genoa when it fell down in 2018, killing 43 people.
summary_public: Giovanni Castellucci oversaw a company that managed the Morandi Bridge in Genoa when it fell down in 2018, killing 43 people.
